observed_gaps.name: response_quality
observed_gaps.why: v8 still underperforms most on response selection and human-facing answer quality.

observed_gaps.name: grounded_tool_and_model_choice
observed_gaps.why: Sample outputs show routing failures on benchmark, materials, and grounded-fact prompts.

observed_gaps.name: creative_communication
observed_gaps.why: v41 should explain, compare, and reassure more naturally instead of defaulting to template fragments.

observed_gaps.name: vision_and_specialist_fusion
observed_gaps.why: v8 improved multimodal accuracy, but v41 still needs cleaner cross-domain fusion between text, vision, materials, protein, and 3D prompts.

gemma4_slice.note: Keep Gemma 4 bounded and quality-gated rather than letting it dominate the teacher mix.

disagreement_mining.note: Save prompts where v8, v40, and qwen disagree, then build compare-and-justify rows instead of taking only the winner.

new_heads.name: latent_plan_slots
new_heads.purpose: Distill short hidden plan states from explicit draft-plan traces, then keep the plans internal at inference time.

new_heads.name: multi_token_prediction_aux
new_heads.purpose: Predict short future spans to increase information density and long-range coherence.

new_heads.name: communication_polish_head
new_heads.purpose: Separate answer correctness from answer presentation so the model learns concise, human-friendly rewrites.

new_heads.name: uncertainty_anchor_head
new_heads.purpose: Teach the model to declare uncertainty and missing evidence instead of inventing specifics.

novel_v41_ideas: Route-first then answer: supervise a hidden route/tool choice before the final answer for better Auto and collective behavior.
Disagreement harvest replay: convert teacher disagreement into compare-and-justify rows instead of only winner-take-all distillation.
Two-pass communication finish: solve first, then learn a short rewrite pass that preserves facts while improving tone and clarity.
Creativity rescue pairs: train on correct-but-flat vs vivid-and-still-grounded answer pairs so creativity does not come from hallucination.
Reflection memory shards: keep tiny verbal post-mortems for failed code, reasoning, and route decisions, then train on improved retries.
Reasoning-budget labels: supervise when the model should think short, medium, or long instead of only increasing deliberation globally.

data_program.name: latent_plan_bootstrap
data_program.source_style: plan-first then answer rows with hidden plan targets
data_program.goal: Teach v41 to infer structure and route choice before generating the final answer.

data_program.name: high_density_reasoning_core
data_program.goal: Raise problem-solving quality without flooding the mix with repetitive low-signal reasoning rows.

data_program.name: code_critique_repair
data_program.source_style: traceback, failing-test, patch, and critique->repair examples
data_program.goal: Improve coding, debugging, and repository-grounded problem solving.

data_program.name: reflection_memory_rows
data_program.source_style: bad attempt, short reflection, repaired answer
data_program.goal: Turn failures into compact reusable repair knowledge instead of only supervising the winning answer.

data_program.name: human_communication_polish
data_program.source_style: rewrite, summarize, compare, explain, reassure, and uncertainty-calibrated replies
data_program.goal: Make v41 more useful and easier to talk to without losing directness.

data_program.name: teacher_disagreement_hardcases
data_program.goal: Expose the model to exactly the prompts where current strong local teachers diverge.

data_program.name: grounded_uncertainty_rows
data_program.source_style: current-fact uncertainty, partial evidence, and missing-tool disclaimers
data_program.goal: Reduce hallucinated specifics and improve transparent communication.

data_program.name: creative_constraint_pairs
data_program.source_style: creative answer pairs scored for vividness, usefulness, and factual discipline
data_program.goal: Boost creativity without dropping answer discipline.

data_program.name: route_then_answer_supervision
data_program.source_style: model selection, tool choice, specialist handoff, then final answer
data_program.goal: Make Auto and collective mode smarter because the base model reasons about routing explicitly.

data_program.name: reasoning_budget_curriculum
data_program.source_style: same task solved under short, medium, and deep reasoning budgets
data_program.goal: Teach the model when extra deliberation is worthwhile instead of overthinking every prompt.

data_program.name: specialist_dense_topups
data_program.source_style: materials, protein, 3D, native image, and science vision deltas
data_program.goal: Keep the specialist fusion edge while shifting more capacity toward coding and human communication.

training_program.recipe: Distill short explicit plans, route choices, and critique stubs into latent slots before normal SFT.
Teacher-heavy mixed SFT with harder coding/problem-solving weighting and a smaller, denser reasoning core.
Generate self-play pairs from v8/v40/qwen-style answers, then train chosen-vs-rejected preference objectives.
Run critique->repair loops on code, tests, and debugging prompts and keep only verifiably improved completions.
Short final polish phase on human communication, grounded uncertainty, and compare/explain prompts using self-refine and AI feedback labels.
Run deterministic self-correction on weak drafts with fair prompts and keep only improved final answers.

promotion_protocol.preview_selection_rule: Promote only the best preview checkpoint by weighted score across benchmark exact, coding repair, communication, and grounded uncertainty packs.
must_not_regress: stage2 vision_accuracy vs v8 by more than 0.02
stage2 domain_accuracy vs v8 by more than 0.02

human_style_gate.description: v41 must beat v8 on the communication-polish eval pack before promotion, even if the raw benchmark score is close.

recent_method_references.name: DeepSeek-V3 Technical Report
recent_method_references.why: Add a compact next-span prediction loss so the model learns denser future-planning structure without a large parameter jump.

recent_method_references.name: Better & Faster Large Language Models via Multi-token Prediction
recent_method_references.why: Use extra future-token heads during training to improve coding and algorithmic reasoning sample efficiency.

recent_method_references.name: s1: Simple test-time scaling
recent_method_references.why: Train with short, medium, and long budget targets so v41 can spend more compute on hard prompts without bloating every answer.

recent_method_references.name: LIMO: Less Is More for Reasoning
recent_method_references.why: Shift part of the reasoning mix away from sheer volume and toward a smaller, harder, cleaner curriculum.

recent_method_references.name: RefineCoder
recent_method_references.why: Use critique-plus-repair traces for bug fixing, test repair, and patch refinement instead of one-shot code answers.

recent_method_references.name: Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning
recent_method_references.why: Store concise failure reflections for debugging and coding tasks instead of only training on final answers.

recent_method_references.name: Self-Play Fine-Tuning (SPIN)
recent_method_references.why: Generate self-play comparisons from v8, v40, and qwen teachers to improve helpfulness and problem-solving without requiring a giant new human-labeled set.

recent_method_references.name: Self-Refine
recent_method_references.why: Teach v41 to critique and rewrite its own drafts into clearer human-facing answers.

recent_method_references.name: Large Language Models have Intrinsic Self-Correction Ability
recent_method_references.why: Use a dedicated self-correction pass with fair prompts and deterministic decoding to reduce hallucinations and repair weak drafts.

recent_method_references.name: RLAIF vs. RLHF: Scaling Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback with AI Feedback
recent_method_references.why: Use strong local teachers as AI preference labelers for communication, helpfulness, and harmlessness style comparisons.

implementation_checklist: Freeze the latest v8 summary, benchmark outputs, and hard-failure prompts as v41 design inputs.
Create new dataset builders for disagreement mining, route-then-answer rows, communication polish pairs, latent-plan rows, and code-repair rows.
Add latent plan slots, multi-token prediction auxiliary loss, and uncertainty-anchor head to the v41 model.
Reuse the improved v8 checkpoint/resume path from the start so long v41 runs survive reboots and disk pressure.
Benchmark preview checkpoints during stage2 rather than waiting until the end of the full run.
Run the new communication, coding-repair, and grounded-uncertainty eval packs before any promotion decision.
